prompt: Create a soft pastel anime-style illustration of three young women sitting close together in a dreamy pink bedroom, framed as a waist-up group portrait in a 3:2 horizontal canvas. The scene has warm morning backlight from a window on the left, sheer curtains, a vase with pink tulips on the windowsill, a bed or sofa with lavender bedding, and a softly blurred wall with small cute framed pictures and posters on the right. Show exactly three girls, all with very short hair variations: the left girl is completely bald with a smooth shaved head, the center girl has an ultra-short brown buzz cut with visible stubble texture, and the right girl has a short dark pixie/buzz cut with spiky texture. Their faces are covered by flat pale pink rectangular censor blocks, one rectangle per girl, matching the soft color palette. Outfit details: the left girl wears a pale pink ribbed cardigan over a white lace camisole with small pink bows, a muted plaid skirt, and dangling flower earrings while touching her ear; the center girl wears a cream cable-knit cardigan with buttons and tiny bows over a white frilled blouse tied with a pale pink ribbon; the right girl wears a white blouse with a frilled collar and black ribbon bow under a pink plaid pinafore dress, with a small dangling earring. Use delicate linework, soft watercolor shading, luminous highlights, blush-pink atmosphere, cozy feminine fashion, high-detail fabric textures, and gentle depth of field. Keep the mood intimate, cute, and serene. Customize the three hair styles as left bald, center ultra-short brown buzz cut, right short dark pixie buzz cut, the setting as soft pink bedroom with tulips, sheer curtains, lavender bedding, and cute wall pictures, the outfit palette as pale pink, cream, white, lavender, and muted plaid, the face covering as flat pale pink rectangular censor blocks over each face, and the lighting as warm hazy morning backlight from the left.
